title: Monday & Canva synchronization problem
excerpt:
I am getting the error in the image. Do you need help with the Monday app? I’m new, so I may not even know the topics that everyone knows. 
Thanks already for your help.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @devilsn and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

It looks like you are trying to see the OAuth scopes authorization screen while on an account that does not have that app installed.

If you install the app, the error should not appear anymore.

Cheers,
Matias
